import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { BarChart3, Target, Brain, Zap, TrendingUp, Calculator, Clock, Minimize2, ArrowRight, Activity, MousePointer, Layers, Eye, Cpu, Database, GitBranch, Sparkles, Microscope, Lightbulb, Award, BookOpen, ChevronDown, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react'; const AnalysisMethodology: React.FC = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'methodology' | 'metrics' | 'definitions' | 'science' | 'insights'>('methodology'); const [selectedMetric, setSelectedMetric] = useState(null); const metricCategories = { ergonomic: { title: 'Ergonomic Factors', color: 'text-green-400', icon: , metrics: [ { name: 'effort', title: 'Total Effort', description: 'Cumulative typing strain based on key difficulty and finger strength', formula: 'Σ(row_difficulty × column_difficulty × character_frequency)', insight: 'Lower effort reduces fatigue and increases typing endurance', goodRange: '< 1.15', impact: 'high' }, { name: 'pinky_distance', title: 'Pinky Travel Distance', description: 'Proportion of total finger travel performed by weakest fingers', formula: 'pinky_movement / total_movement', insight: 'Minimizing pinky usage prevents RSI and improves comfort', goodRange: '< 15%', impact: 'high' }, { name: 'lateral_stretch_pct', title: 'Lateral Stretches', description: 'Awkward sideways finger stretches within same hand', formula: 'lateral_stretch_bigrams / total_bigrams × 100', insight: 'Reduces finger strain and prevents uncomfortable movements', goodRange: '< 5%', impact: 'medium' } ] }, flow: { title: 'Flow & Rhythm', color: 'text-blue-400', icon: , metrics: [ { name: 'roll_in_pct', title: 'Inward Rolls', description: 'Smooth finger sequences rolling toward keyboard center', formula: 'inward_roll_bigrams / total_bigrams × 100', insight: 'Natural rolling motions increase typing speed and feel', goodRange: '> 15%', impact: 'high' }, { name: 'trigram_alt_pct', title: 'Hand Alternation', description: 'Three-letter sequences alternating between hands', formula: 'alternating_trigrams / total_trigrams × 100', insight: 'Hand alternation allows one hand to rest while other types', goodRange: '> 60%', impact: 'medium' }, { name: 'tri_redirect_pct', title: 'Direction Changes', description: 'Trigrams requiring awkward direction reversals', formula: 'redirect_trigrams / total_trigrams × 100', insight: 'Fewer direction changes create smoother typing flow', goodRange: '< 20%', impact: 'medium' } ] }, precision: { title: 'Precision & Accuracy', color: 'text-purple-400', icon: , metrics: [ { name: 'same_finger_bigrams_pct', title: 'Same Finger Bigrams', description: 'Letter pairs requiring same finger consecutively', formula: 'same_finger_bigrams / total_bigrams × 100', insight: 'Same finger usage slows typing and increases errors', goodRange: '< 2%', impact: 'high' }, { name: 'pinky_scissors_pct', title: 'Pinky Scissors', description: 'Awkward pinky-ring finger crossing movements', formula: 'scissor_bigrams / total_bigrams × 100', insight: 'Scissoring motions are unnatural and error-prone', goodRange: '< 0.5%', impact: 'high' }, { name: 'skip_bigrams_pct', title: 'Skip Bigrams', description: 'Adjacent keys skipped in same row sequence', formula: 'skip_bigrams / total_bigrams × 100', insight: 'Skipping keys can lead to misfires and typos', goodRange: '< 3%', impact: 'medium' } ] }, position: { title: 'Key Positioning', color: 'text-yellow-400', icon: , metrics: [ { name: 'col5_6_pct', title: 'Center Column Usage', description: 'Usage of hard-to-reach center columns (T, Y keys)', formula: 'center_keystrokes / total_keystrokes × 100', insight: 'Center columns are harder to reach and less accurate', goodRange: '< 8%', impact: 'medium' }, { name: 'pinky_off_home_pct', title: 'Pinky Off-Home', description: 'Pinky keystrokes away from home row position', formula: 'pinky_off_home / pinky_keystrokes × 100', insight: 'Keeping pinkies on home row improves accuracy', goodRange: '< 30%', impact: 'medium' }, { name: 'two_row_jumps_pct', title: 'Row Jumping', description: 'Bigrams requiring two-row vertical movements', formula: 'two_row_jumps / total_bigrams × 100', insight: 'Large vertical movements slow typing and cause errors', goodRange: '< 8%', impact: 'medium' } ] } }; return (

Scientific Analysis Framework

Discover how we analyze keyboard layouts using advanced computational linguistics, biomechanical modeling, and statistical analysis to optimize your typing experience.

{/* Navigation Tabs */}
{[ { id: 'methodology', label: 'Methodology', icon: }, { id: 'metrics', label: 'Metrics Deep Dive', icon: }, { id: 'definitions', label: 'Metric Definitions', icon: }, { id: 'science', label: 'The Science', icon: }, { id: 'insights', label: 'AI Insights', icon: } ].map(tab => ( ))}
{/* Tab Content */} {activeTab === 'methodology' && (
{/* Overview */}

Analysis Overview

Our analysis engine processes keyboard layouts using the same methodology as the renowned cyanophage analyzer, evaluating 17 key metrics that impact typing comfort, speed, and accuracy.

17 Core Metrics

Comprehensive analysis of typing patterns and biomechanics

Real-world Data

Analysis based on actual text corpora and word frequencies

Biomechanical Focus

Considers hand anatomy, finger strength, and ergonomics

{/* Process Steps */}

Analysis Process

1

Text Corpus Analysis

Process large text samples to determine letter, bigram, and trigram frequencies. We analyze millions of words from books, articles, and code repositories.

2

Layout Mapping

Map each character to its physical position and assigned finger, considering standard touch typing technique and hand positions.

3

Metric Calculation

Calculate all 17 metrics using frequency-weighted analysis, biomechanical models, and statistical methods validated by research.

4

Normalization & Scoring

Normalize metrics across different text types and generate personalized recommendations based on user profiles and preferences.

)} {/* Metrics Deep Dive Tab */} {activeTab === 'metrics' && (
{Object.entries(metricCategories).map(([categoryKey, category]) => (
{category.icon}

{category.title}

{category.metrics.map((metric) => (
setSelectedMetric(selectedMetric === metric.name ? null : metric.name)} >

{metric.title}

{metric.impact} impact

{metric.description}

Target: {metric.goodRange}
{selectedMetric === metric.name && (

Formula

{metric.formula}

Why It Matters

{metric.insight}

)}
))}
))}
)} {/* The Science Tab */} {activeTab === 'science' && (

Research Foundation

Corpus Linguistics

Our analysis is grounded in computational linguistics, using massive text corpora to determine real-world character and sequence frequencies:

  • • 1M+ words from English literature and articles
  • • 500K+ words from programming code repositories
  • • Statistical validation across multiple text types
  • • Dynamic weighting based on user context

Biomechanical Modeling

We incorporate established research on hand anatomy and ergonomics:

  • • Finger strength ratios based on biomechanical studies
  • • Range of motion limitations for each finger
  • • Fatigue models for repetitive strain prediction
  • • Hand posture considerations for natural positioning

Mathematical Framework

Frequency-Weighted Analysis

Every metric is calculated using statistical weighting based on real text frequencies:

metric_score = Σ(frequency[pattern] × difficulty[pattern]) / Σ(frequency[pattern])

Bigram Analysis

676 possible letter pairs analyzed for movement patterns

Trigram Analysis

17,576 three-letter patterns for flow and alternation

Position Analysis

30-key layout with finger assignments and reach distances

)} {/* AI Insights Tab */} {activeTab === 'insights' && (

AI-Powered Insights

Our machine learning models analyze thousands of layout combinations to provide personalized recommendations and predict typing performance.

Predictive Modeling

  • Speed Prediction: Estimate WPM potential based on layout metrics
  • Fatigue Analysis: Predict strain accumulation over time
  • Error Modeling: Forecast common mistake patterns
  • Learning Curve: Estimate adaptation time for new layouts

Optimization Engine

  • Multi-objective: Balance speed, comfort, and accuracy
  • Context-aware: Adapt to different text types and user needs
  • Genetic Algorithm: Evolve layouts through iterative improvement
  • Pareto Optimization: Find optimal trade-offs between metrics

Smart Recommendations

Adaptive Weighting

Machine learning adjusts metric importance based on user behavior and preferences.

Personalization

Recommendations evolve based on typing patterns, speed, and comfort feedback.

Temporal Analysis

Track improvement over time and adjust difficulty curves accordingly.

Goal Setting

AI suggests realistic improvement targets and training regimens.

)} {/* Footer */}

Open Source & Research Based

Our analysis methodology is based on the open-source cyanophage analyzer and academic research in ergonomics and biomechanics. All calculations are transparent and can be verified through our source code.

MIT Licensed Research Validated Community Driven
); }; export default AnalysisMethodology;
